gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.whyWatch: 用声音编织的跨时空浪漫，温柔治愈你所有孤独。
gems.whyWatchEn: A tender, voice-driven romance that turns accidental messages into an unexpected connection across distance and grief.
gems.audience: 喜欢温暖、不套路爱情故事的观众，以及曾因失去而寻找慰藉的人。
gems.audienceEn: Viewers who enjoy warm, unconventional love stories and those seeking solace in unexpected connections.

gems.title: 宇宙巨人：希曼崛起
gems.whyWatch: 经典IP硬核重启，怀旧与热血并存的奇幻冒险。
gems.whyWatchEn: A gritty, nostalgic revival of a beloved franchise that blends epic fantasy with modern action sensibilities.
gems.audience: 80、90后怀旧粉丝，以及热爱奇幻动作大片的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Nostalgic fans of the original series and lovers of epic fantasy-action blockbusters.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.whyWatch: 玩具与科技的温柔对决，皮克斯再创情感深度。
gems.whyWatchEn: A surprisingly poignant exploration of childhood in the digital age, balancing humor with heart.
gems.audience: 家庭观众、皮克斯粉丝，以及关注数字时代儿童成长的家长。
gems.audienceEn: Families, Pixar enthusiasts, and parents reflecting on technology's role in childhood.
